org_insights.reporting_structure: Beanz sits outside Phil McKnight's Specialty Coffee BU, which causes organizational tension ('jarring concept' per Phil)
org_insights.brand_challenge: Regions interpret Beanz support as selective FTBP moments, not year-round brand narrative
org_insights.budget_note: Beanz has no separate budget line — relies on Breville regional budgets for activations
org_insights.three_legged_stool: Beanz is 'arguably the first leg' of the moat Cliff is building — machines, beans service, and premium experience
